tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij zdania, wstawiając wyrazy podane w nawiasach w odpowiedniej formie. Wymagana jest pełna poprawność gramatyczna i ortograficzna odpowiedzi.

items.context: Tom said that he _________ (be) tired and that he _________ (go) home early.
She told me she _________ (not / can) come because she _________ (lose) her keys.
The teacher asked us where we _________ (live) and whether we _________ (enjoy) the trip.
My dad told me _________ (not / forget) my umbrella because it _________ (rain) later.
Anna said that she _________ (visit) Rome the previous year and that she _________ (want) to return.
He asked me if I _________ (finish) my homework yet and what time I _________ (start) it.
